settings.heading: Custom banners and signs for schools, teams, businesses and events.
settings.lead: Request quote-ready help for sponsor banners, event signage, school displays, business signs and campaign graphics.
settings.body:
L F Graphco supports organizations that need more than apparel. Banners and signs help promote events, recognize sponsors, guide customers and bring campaigns into the real world.

Send size, quantity, location, artwork and deadline details so the team can recommend the right next step.
settings.features: Sponsor Banners,Event Signs,School Displays,Business Signage,Campaign Graphics

settings.heading: Share artwork, size and deadline details.
settings.intro: Upload artwork notes or a file link so L F Graphco can review the project and prepare a clear quote path.

settings.heading: Tell us what sign or banner you need.
settings.intro: Send size, quantity, project type and due date. L F Graphco will follow up with next steps for quote review.
